# QA Plan: Sprint 39 — Deeper Polish: C2/Platform / Hygiene / Perf / Evidence / Replay + Dispatching Refinements

**Date:** 2026-06-20  
**Generated by:** /qa-plan sprint 39  
**Scope:** 11 stories across deeper polish (C2/Platform residual polish, hygiene/CI/docs, perf P1 + replay maint, evidence/playtest 11, dispatching refinements, closeout) per sprint plan  
**Engine:** Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode for Unity adapter + C2 proxies in ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests)  
**Sprint File:** `production/sprints/sprint-39-deeper-polish-c2-platform-hygiene.md`  
**Trunk:** `main` @ (post-S38 commit)  
**Sprint Dates:** 2026-06-20 to ~2026-06-30  
**Review mode:** **Lean** (`production/review-mode.txt` — PR-SPRINT skipped; parallel domain agents)  
**Authority:** `polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` (deeper polish continuation) + S38  

**Scope Compliance Note (enforced):** Strictly inside `polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` + S38 precedent (Baltic + C2 18/18 + Platform Editor C–H polish + replay + P0/P1 perf only; no globe, no badges, no DOTS, extend-only CatalogWriteGate, ZERO DelegationBridge.cs, production Baltic hash immutable `17144800277401907079`, headless primary, lean evidence). Every story must cite boundary + S38. S39-02 (this plan) blocks all feature waves. Test baseline ≥1213; closeout target ≥1213 (no regression; post-S38).

## Automated Tests Required

### S39-03 C2 + Platform Editor deeper polish

**Test file paths:**
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Projection/PlatformCatalogFilterProjectionTests.cs`
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Platform/PlatformCatalogViewerTests.cs`
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Presentation/C2PresentationControllerTests.cs`

**What to test:**
- `PlatformCatalogFilterProjection.Apply` matches on PlatformId **and** formatted display row (density/search UX)
- ID filter regression (e.g. `hostile-1`, `u1`) unchanged
- C2 graph surfacing proxy paths (Graph*) remain green
- PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests 18/18+ after Unity host tooltip polish

**Edge cases:**
- Empty filter returns all rows
- Case-insensitive match on formatted row content (e.g. `hp=`, numeric values)
- No CatalogWriteGate or DelegationBridge mutation

### S39-05 Perf / Replay

**Test file paths:** `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` + isolated `tests/regression/replay-golden-*.txt` only

**What to test:**
- ReplayGolden 6/6 after any fixture maint
- Production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged

## C2 Proxy Gate Matrix (18/18+)

Maintain all S38 proxy checks including Graph* filters. S39-03 additions:
- Platform filter by formatted row content (headless projection tests)
- PlatformCatalogViewerHost tooltip binding (Unity host; lean proxy acceptable)

Filter command:

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests"
```

---

## Playtest Protocol (S39-07)

**Session 11 focus:** C2/Platform deeper polish — filter density, tooltip legibility, graph surfacing residuals.  
**Deliverable:** `production/playtests/playtest-*-s39-*.md` with think-aloud notes.  
**Gates:** All automated gates green before session; advisory UX findings only (no scope expansion).
